extraction.one_line_summary: JUNGELS Bob won solo after attacking in the final kilometers, holding off late charges from POZZOVIVO, MOLLEMA, YATES, and QUINTANA who sprinted for bonifications.
tactical_patterns: ROLLAND Pierre bridged solo to breakaway on penultimate climb while peloton tempo-controlled, classic opportunistic energy preservation move.
QUINTANA Nairo sprinted finish despite mechanical to claim 6-second bonus, treating stage finish as time-bonus opportunity not stage win.
MOLLEMA Bauke attacked final kilometer after losing GC time previous day, revenge-hunting stage win rather than defending position.
JUNGELS Bob time-trialed final 2km alone after group fragmentation, Quick-Step prioritizing stage hunting over GC support for others.

rider_signals.JUNGELS Bob: positive: soloed to victory in final kilometers with time-trial power, sixth Quick-Step stage win shows team dominance
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: neutral: crashed/mechanical mid-climb yet sprinted finish for 6-second bonus, prioritizing marginal GC gains over recovery
rider_signals.POZZOVIVO Domenico: positive: animated final kilometer with multiple attacks despite smaller stature, competed for stage win not just GC defense
rider_signals.MOLLEMA Bauke: neutral: attacked after yesterday's GC loss showing morale intact but lacked sprint finish to convert opportunity
rider_signals.DUMOULIN Tom: positive: neutralized race during Quintana mechanical showing GC confidence, finished comfortably in group maintaining 2:41 advantage
rider_signals.YATES Adam: negative: launched sprint first but faded badly, poor timing discipline cost potential stage win and bonifications
rider_signals.PINOT Thibaut: neutral: placed third in finale sprint maintaining GC position without decisive aggression
